text: A lien under Section 315.072 (Lien) is superior to any other lien, claim, or title, except a municipal, county, or state tax.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.073 — Priority of Lien

A lien under Section 315.072 (Lien) is superior to any other lien, claim, or title, except a municipal, county, or state tax.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A lien under Section 315.072 (Lien) is superior to any other lien, claim, or title, except a municipal, county, or state tax.
